[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111110 5
1 10100100 3
2 11010111 6
3 00011101 4
4 01110101 5
5 01011111 6
6 01011000 3
7 10100100 3

01 10 11010111 6 match 2
12 21 10011010 4

56 65 11000011 4

70 07 10001111 5
